commit_message: fix: Next.js 16 build type errors for ToolData and prisma return types
title: Fix Next.js 16 type errors for ToolData and Prisma return types
description:
Resolved Next.js 16 build errors caused by missing strict typings.

Changes made:
- Added required `createdAt` and `updatedAt` string fields to the `ToolData` interface in `src/components/ToolCard.tsx`.
- Changed `tags` and `markdownContent` to strictly match the API schema instead of being optional.
- Fixed implicit `any` type mappings for Prisma result rows returned by `getTools` and `getApiKeys` in `src/app/actions.ts`.

The application now successfully completes the Next.js `build` and `lint` pipeline without emitting any errors.
